# Atomic Absorption Analysis

**Summary**: An analytical technique for the quantitative determination of chemical elements.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] used atomic-absorption-analysis to determine Ca2+ and Mg2+ concentrations in reaction products.
